mlb.headline: Fantasy baseball lineup advice for Tuesday: Roupp, Early among top arms to add
mlb.summary: Everything you need to know to set your fantasy baseball lineups for Tuesday's MLB action.

mlb.headline: Fantasy baseball free agent pickups: Take advantage of the Rockies' home stretch
mlb.summary: The top players you should consider claiming off the fantasy baseball waiver wire this week.

mlb.headline: 2026 MLB awards tracker: Odds for MVP, Cy Young, Rookie of the Year
mlb.summary: Who are the favorites to win seasonlong honors? Here are the odds for MVP, Cy Young and Rookie of the Year in the AL and NL.

mlb.headline: Every team's odds to win the World Series: Dodgers lead, Brewers and Phillies improve
mlb.summary: Every MLB team's odds to win the 2026 World Series, led by the Dodgers. Phillies, Brewers coming on strong.

mlb.headline: MLB betting tips for Monday: Bet on Soler to homer in AL West showdown
mlb.summary: All of the odds, recommended prop bets and trends in baseball for Monday, June 29.

mlb.headline: Wimbledon's strawberries and cream leads sports world's signature food, drink staples
mlb.summary: The refreshing concoction is an All England Lawn Tennis and Croquet Club staple, but Wimbledon isn't the only event associated with a signature food or beverage item.

nhl.headline: Sharks ink newly acquired Michael Kesselring to 3-year deal
nhl.summary: The Sharks signed newly acquired defenseman Michael Kesselring to a three-year, $13.5 million contract Monday.

nhl.headline: Gallagher traded to Vancouver, capping 14 seasons in Montreal
nhl.summary: Brendan Gallagher was traded to Vancouver on Monday in exchange for future considerations.

nhl.headline: Sabres re-sign Beck Malenstyn to a six-year, $17.5M contract
nhl.summary: The Buffalo Sabres re-signed checking-line forward Beck Malenstyn to a six-year, $17.5 million contract on Monday, two days before free agency opens.

nhl.headline: NHL free agency 2026: How all 32 teams can earn an A+
nhl.summary: With the market set to open July 1, we identify key free agents for each team and what those teams should do.

nhl.headline: Predators sign faceoff ace Jack Drury to 5-year, $22.5M deal
nhl.summary: The Predators signed forward Jack Drury to a five-year, $22.5 million contract on Sunday night, four days after he was acquired from the Avalanche.

nhl.headline: 2026 NHL draft grades: Best, worst, most surprising picks
nhl.summary: Which teams added the most value this weekend? Who whiffed badly? We grade all 32 here.

nba.headline: Thunder pick up forward Lu Dort's $17.7 million option
nba.summary: The Thunder on Monday exercised forward Lu Dort's 2026-27 contract option.

nba.headline: Shams breaks down the Ja Morant trade to the Trail Blazers
nba.summary: Shams breaks down the Ja Morant trade to the Trail Blazers

nba.headline: Sources: Landry Shamet intends to ink 4-year deal with Knicks
nba.summary: Landry Shamet intends to sign a four-year, $24 million deal with the Knicks, sources told ESPN's Shams Charania on Monday.

nba.headline: Sources: Julian Champagnie to sign 3-year, $45M deal with Spurs
nba.summary: Spurs forward Julian Champagnie intends to sign a new three-year, $45 million contract with the franchise through 2028-29, sources told ESPN on Monday.

nba.headline: 2026 NBA buzz: Latest news, injuries, league intel, live updates
nba.summary: We're tracking the latest news, rumors and buzz across the NBA, including what we're hearing ahead of free agency and which players could be traded.

nba.headline: Sources: Jonathan Kuminga a free agent as Hawks decline option
nba.summary: The Hawks are declining Jonathan Kuminga's $24.3 million team option, making him a free agent, sources told ESPN.

wnba.headline: Mercury rookie Jovana Nogić to miss rest of 2026 season
wnba.summary: Mercury rookie Jovana Nogić will miss the remainder of the 2026 season because of personal reasons, the team announced Monday.

wnba.headline: Fantasy women's hoops: Nelson-Ododa, Leite among this week's top player picks
wnba.summary: Here are four free agents to add to your fantasy women's basketball lineups this week.

wnba.headline: 2026 WNBA championship odds: Lynx continue to see odds shorten; now standalone favorites
wnba.summary: The Lynx move ahead of the Aces and Liberty as favorites to win the WNBA championship.

wnba.headline: Liberty's Marine Johannes is signing a multiyear Unrivaled deal
wnba.summary: New York Liberty guard Marine Johannes is signing a multiyear deal with Unrivaled.

wnba.summary: — Sonia Citron scored 32 points, including the basket that put her team ahead to stay with 21.4 seconds left, and the Washington Mystics held off the Portland Fire 124-123 on Sunday in four overtimes — tying the longest game in WNBA history.

wnba.headline: A’ja Wilson has a WNBA first with 30 points, 15 rebounds, 4 steals, 3 blocks in Aces' win over Sky
wnba.summary: — A’ja Wilson had 30 points, 15 rebounds, four steals and three blocks to become the first player in WNBA history to reach those marks in a game as the Las Vegas Aces beat the Chicago Sky 107-99 on Sunday.
